heading: Why book this through us, specifically

cards.title: Permits handled, properly
cards.text: Unauthorized camping is a real legal risk in the Maldives. We only work with operators who secure correct permission every time, with no shortcuts.

cards.title: Safety-checked operators
cards.text: We vet the boats and guides used for these trips the same way we vet dive and fishing partners — licensing and safety equipment confirmed, not assumed.

cards.title: Matched to your comfort level
cards.text: A day picnic and a multi-night expedition are very different trips — we ask what you actually want before recommending either.
